chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – Marriage of the Zimmy woman (under the responsibility)

text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ عُمَرَ عَنْ دُرُسْتَ الْوَاسِطِيِّ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ رِئَابٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ بْنِ أَعْيَنَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا يَنْبَغِي نِكَاحُ أَهْلِ الْكِتَابِ قُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ وَ أَيْنَ تَحْرِيمُهُ قَالَ قَوْلُهُ وَ لا تُمْسِكُوا بِعِصَمِ الْكَوافِرِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ahmad Bin Umar, from Dorost Al Wasity, from Ali Bin Raib, from Zurara Bin Ayn,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘It is not befitting to marry the People of the Book’. I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for youasws! And where is its Prohibition?’ Heasws said: ‘Hisazwj Words [60:10] and hold not to the ties of marriage of unbelieving women’.
